LuxScaleAI - Uniformity (point-by-point IES grid)
Timestamp: 2026-04-02T14:43:30.214582
Mode: FULL.
Room length (m): 80, width (m): 90, ceiling height (m): 7.0
Required lux: 500.0, Standard Uo: 0.6
Work plane z = 0.75 m; fixture grid symmetric on full floor (edge inset = half of centre-to-centre spacing); illuminance grid 5x5 same rule.

========================================================================
Option 1 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=501.16 lx (×0.4652)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=16.0, y=1.139240506329114, edge half-spacing (m) x=8.0, y=0.569620253164557, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 395, phi_each_lm=14500.00, phi_total_lm=5727500.00

Results:

  E_avg (lx): 501.156250
  E_max (lx): 523.917563

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    473.7211    498.2178    499.6523    498.2178    473.7211
    491.3495    519.8387    521.7135    519.8387    491.3495

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 2 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=504.00 lx (×0.6907)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=4.444444444444445, y=4.5, edge half-spacing (m) x=2.2222222222222223, y=2.25, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 360, phi_each_lm=16000.00, phi_total_lm=5760000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 457.681163
  E_avg (lx): 504.000000
  E_max (lx): 541.536968
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.908098
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.845152

Fixture positions (x, y) m:
  1: (2.2222, 2.2500)

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    457.6812    489.3946    491.4880    489.3946    457.6812
    497.4411    536.0649    538.8121    536.0649    497.4411
    499.1491    538.6186    541.5370    538.6186    499.1491
    497.4411    536.0649    538.8121    536.0649    497.4411
    457.6812    489.3946    491.4880    489.3946    457.6812

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 3 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=500.50 lx (×0.6890)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=6.153846153846154, y=4.090909090909091, edge half-spacing (m) x=3.076923076923077, y=2.0454545454545454, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 286, phi_each_lm=20000.00, phi_total_lm=5720000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 457.321084
  E_avg (lx): 500.500000
  E_max (lx): 543.545702
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.913728
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.841366

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    457.3211    489.4147    490.9050    489.4147    457.3211
    487.7114    526.4708    528.7997    526.4708    487.7114

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 4 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_150W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=502.43 lx (×0.6886)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 24000.00 lm; IES file header: 24000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=6.666666666666667, y=4.090909090909091, edge half-spacing (m) x=3.3333333333333335, y=2.0454545454545454, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 264, phi_each_lm=21750.00, phi_total_lm=5742000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 454.446247
  E_avg (lx): 502.425000
  E_max (lx): 543.408670
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.904506
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.836288

    454.4462    486.6060    488.2219    486.6060    454.4462

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 5 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_150W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=504.00 lx (×0.6855)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 24000.00 lm; IES file header: 24000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=5.333333333333333, y=5.625, edge half-spacing (m) x=2.6666666666666665, y=2.8125, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 240, phi_each_lm=24000.00, phi_total_lm=5760000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 462.191454
  E_avg (lx): 504.000000
  E_max (lx): 537.322921
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.917047
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.860174

Fixture positions (x, y) m:
  1: (2.6667, 2.8125)
  2: (2.6667, 8.4375)
  3: (2.6667, 14.0625)
  4: (2.6667, 19.6875)

    462.1915    488.6442    488.0247    488.6442    462.1915

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 6 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_150W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=504.00 lx (×0.6881)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 24000.00 lm; IES file header: 24000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=6.666666666666667, y=5.625, edge half-spacing (m) x=3.3333333333333335, y=2.8125, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 192, phi_each_lm=30000.00, phi_total_lm=5760000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 459.169455
  E_avg (lx): 504.000000
  E_max (lx): 541.010625
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.911051
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.848725

Fixture positions (x, y) m:
  1: (3.3333, 2.8125)

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 7 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_200W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=502.43 lx (×0.6880)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 32000.00 lm; IES file header: 32000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=7.2727272727272725, y=5.0, edge half-spacing (m) x=3.6363636363636362, y=2.5, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 198, phi_each_lm=29000.00, phi_total_lm=5742000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 445.554838
  E_avg (lx): 502.425000
  E_max (lx): 553.419109
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.886809
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.805095

Fixture positions (x, y) m:

Option 8 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_200W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=504.00 lx (×0.6807)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 32000.00 lm; IES file header: 32000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=6.666666666666667, y=6.0, edge half-spacing (m) x=3.3333333333333335, y=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0

  E_avg (lx): 504.000000

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    456.7778    487.2069    489.2533    487.2069    456.7778
    505.8094    542.8706    545.5558    542.8706    505.8094

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 9 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_200W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=500.50 lx (×0.6871)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 32000.00 lm; IES file header: 32000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=7.2727272727272725, y=6.923076923076923, edge half-spacing (m) x=3.6363636363636362, y=3.4615384615384617, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 143, phi_each_lm=40000.00, phi_total_lm=5720000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 447.874408
  E_avg (lx): 500.500000
  E_max (lx): 566.993897
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.894854
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.789910

========================================================================
Option 10 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC flood light exterior
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_FLOOD_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=501.16 lx (×0.4652)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)
